name: multi-turn-add-element
description: Multi-turn: create chart then add a reference line
messages: Plot Google (GOOG) stock price over time
Add a horizontal line at the average price
rubric: Final chart must show GOOG stock price as a line over time AND a horizontal rule mark at the average price. The reference line should be visually distinct (different color or dashed). Both marks must be present. Only Google data should be shown, not other stocks.
